stemHtml: What does the term "significant point" mean?

options.a: A signal indicating the direction of the runway-in-use.
options.b: A specified geographical position used in defining an ATS route or the flight path of an aircraft and for other navigation and ATS purposes.
options.c: A defined position on an aerodrome used for the calibration of the inertial navigation system.
options.d: A specified geographical position used to define an area navigation route or the flight path of an aircraft employing area navigation.
